name: jobdatelens
description: Chrome extension that shows datePosted and validThrough from JobPosting JSON-LD on job pages.

scripts.package:extension: npm test && version=$(node -p "require('./manifest.json').version") && mkdir -p dist && rm -f "dist/jobdatelens-v${version}.zip" && zip -j "dist/jobdatelens-v${version}.zip" manifest.json background.js content.js content.css
